Upload multiple products at once using CSV format.

CSV Template

Download our CSV template to ensure your data is formatted correctly.

Download Template
Upload Products
Drag & drop your CSV file here

or click to browse files

Maximum file size: 10MB. Only CSV files allowed.
CSV Format Requirements:
  • Columns: name, description, price, category, imageUrl, size, sku, stock
  • Name and price are required fields
  • Price should be a valid decimal number
  • Stock should be a non-negative integer
  • SKU must be unique across all products
  • Category should match existing categories
